name: skill dataset entry includes a pattern_category field tagged from the inferred rule kind
command:
mkdir -p pr && printf 'diff --git a/x.js b/x.js
--- a/x.js
+++ b/x.js
@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
-eval(s)
+safeParse(s)
' > pr/diff.patch && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/pr-to-eval-dataset/extract.sh" --diff pr/diff.patch --pattern-category security --emit dataset --out dataset.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"pattern_category":"security"' dataset.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
